LSE-MS8-L2-1400P-MSSCI8-TTM-API-01 • MS Science Grade 8 • Newton's First and Second Laws

The Wa'a Needs Two

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION: Why do the girl and boy need to paddle together on the same side?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Explain the cause-and-effect relationship the boy establishes between what he notices about the canoe and what he tells the girl they must do.
